title: Marinda's Pork Belly
excerpt: Ingredients 1.5kg pork belly baking powder coarse salt 1 onion, roughly chopped 1 carrot, roughly chopped 6 cloves garlic, crushed thyme parsley sage 2 cups water 1 bottle Savanna, or 2 – 3 cups apple juice, depending on the size of the dish 1 cup cream Method Make diagonal (or diamond) cuts in the skin of …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1.5kg pork belly
  • baking powder
  • coarse salt
  • 1 onion, roughly chopped
  • 1 carrot, roughly chopped
  • 6 cloves garlic, crushed
  • thyme
  • parsley
  • sage
  • 2 cups water
  • 1 bottle Savanna, or 2 – 3 cups apple juice, depending on the size of the dish
  • 1 cup cream

Method

Make diagonal (or diamond) cuts in the skin of the pork belly. Then rub the baking powder and coarse salt into the skin.

Place the onion, carrot, garlic and herbs in the bottom of a large roasting dish and place the pork belly on top, skin side up. Add the water and Savanna or apple juice, but make sure the skin stays dry.

Bake uncovered for an hour and a half at 160 ºC. Take it out and add any vegetables. Bake further uncovered for another hour and a half.

Take out the pork belly and vegetables and add a cup of cream to the meat juices. Place in a saucepan and let it cook until the sauce reduces and thickens.

Serves 6 portions with vegetables.

Easy!
